bullets: Led technology strategy and execution for an emerging e-commerce brand, driving platform scalability and business alignment.
Architected and deployed a Next.js-based platform with integrated analytics to track KPIs and guide data-driven decisions.
Contributed to product R&D and strategic planning, ensuring technical solutions supported growth and market positioning.
Designed and prototyped a sustainable performance sweatshirt using SeaCell fiber, managing the full product lifecycle from fiber selection to garment construction.
Collaborated cross-functionally with textile scientists, process engineers, and design leads to align performance, aesthetics, and manufacturability.
Delivered a structured technical dossier and product narrative — bridging R&D insights with consumer-facing use cases and sustainable market potential.

education.description: Specializing in interaction design, material innovation, and product strategy.
